creator: yoshiaki@kt.rim.or.jp
text:
This is "trivial fix".
MASTER_SITE update

--- Makefile.old        2020-04-27 23:42:31.487012000 +0900
+++ Makefile    2020-04-28 18:38:27.355690000 +0900
@@ -5,11 +5,7 @@
 PORTVERSION=   6.7
 PORTREVISION=  8
 CATEGORIES=    math
-MASTER_SITES=  http://boxen.math.washington.edu/home/sagemath/sage-mirror/src/ \
-               http://mirrors.xmission.com/sage/src/ \
-               http://www-ftp.lip6.fr/pub/math/sagemath/src/ \
-               http://mirrors.mit.edu/sage/src/ \
-               http://www.sagemath.org/src-old/
+MASTER_SITES=   http://old.files.sagemath.org/src-old/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX= -math

 MAINTAINER=    stephen@FreeBSD.org
